settings.quote: My Plan to GRO journal is my constant daily companion! I don't go anywhere without her!! As a busy mom, of course I need daily tasks and calendars but more importantly, this journal helps me keep those tasks in alignment with my overall goals and intentions. YOU NEED THIS PLANNER IN YOUR LIFE!
settings.author: Alex

settings.quote: My Plan to GRO Journal has actually changed my life! No - Really! It has helped me to prioritize my goals each and every day and takes the guesswork out of being intentional with my time!
settings.author: Kimmy

settings.quote: I love my Plan to Gro Journal!! Naturally I am not a disciplined person...like at all. But I've used the Plan to Gro Journal for almost 2 years now and it's helped me create the disciplines and routines that I've always wanted. I love being able to create my to do list, plan the day (hour by hour) and track my progress. Having the visual habit chart has been a game changer for me!
settings.author: Kaitlyn

settings.quote: I have been using the plan to gro journals for over 5 years now!! They are a must in my daily walk for peace, success and living life in alignment with what matters most! I use it as a plan for each day, week, month and quarter. There are many benefits to this journal that it is impossible to sum up in a quick review. 5 out of 5 stars and I have recommended it to so many. I guess the best thing I can convey is that I am a different person because of this journal. I am living a different life, a life that is organized and meaningful and one I am proud of. Thank you, Lori!!
settings.author: Jill

settings.quote: The Plan to gro journal is everything I never knew I needed! As a wife, mother, and business owner I quickly went from just surviving, to truly thriving. The chaos of my thoughts are no longer bottled up in my head. I'm SO thankful I found this planner!!
settings.author: Morgan

settings.hero_title_line2: With a planner that grows with you
settings.hero_description: The undated, faith-based planner journal created for the woman ready to say goodbye to chaos!
settings.product_intro: Start living with more intention, clarity, and peace — beginning today.
settings.product_description: The Plan to GRO Journal is a thoughtfully designed, faith-based 12-week daily planner and journal created for women who are ready to organize what matters most and grow from the inside out. Whether you're managing a home, nurturing a family, or simply trying to find space to breathe between busy moments, this journal gently guides you toward your most beautiful life—one page at a time.
settings.product_shipping_note: Get your journal free — just cover the $10 flat-rate for shipping. Currently, we only ship within the United States.

settings.about_quote: Out of that chaos, the Plan to GRO was born.
